steps.title: Use the contrast
steps.content: The sentence describes the accessory spleen as "seemingly functionless," then says researchers think its role is not blank; rather, it may actively support diving mechanisms. The blank must mean inactive or hidden, contrasting with "actively support."

steps.title: Eliminate wrong meanings
steps.content: Choice A, "replicable," means able to be repeated. Choice B, "predetermined," means decided in advance. Choice C, "operative," means functioning, which conflicts with the contrast between an apparently inactive role and one that may actively support diving. The word meaning inactive or dormant fits the context. The answer is D.
